title: Section 17
content: (1) The Central Council shall furnish copies of its minutes and of the minutes of the Executive Committee and an annual report of its activities 1*** to the Central Government. (2) The Central Government may publish in such manner as it may think fit any report, 2[or copy], furnished to it under this section or under section 16.
footnote: 1. The words "together with an abstract of its accounts" omitted by s. 10, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-9-1976). 2. Subs. by Act 70 of 1976, s. 10, for copy or abstract (w.e.f. 1-9-1976).
